description_long: This is a round cake with a light, airy appearance, featuring a layer of white icing on top and piped dollops of beige cream around the sides. The top is decorated with white meringue kisses, caramelized nut clusters, and scattered almond flakes, giving it a textured and artisanal look. The cake sits on a thin, circular golden board, which provides a subtle contrast to the cake's pale tones. The surface of the cake is smooth with visible swirls and peaks from the icing and cream, while the decorations add a touch of elegance and complexity. The overall presentation suggests a delicate, patisserie-style dessert, likely intended for special occasions. The cake appears to be of moderate size, suitable for sharing among several people.
description: A round, elegantly decorated cake with white icing, meringue kisses, caramelized nuts, and almond flakes, presented on a golden board. The cake features piped cream details and a refined, artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's piped cream border, white icing top, and a variety of meringue and nut decorations concentrated toward the left side.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the cake's smooth icing and the distribution of meringue kisses and nuts, with more almond flakes visible on the right.
description_view_2: The cake's piped cream border is prominent, and the meringue decorations are more evenly spaced, with caramelized nuts and almond flakes scattered across the top.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the cake's round shape, with meringue kisses and nuts distributed toward the back, and the golden board clearly visible.
